response.overview: "Superman & Lois" is an American superhero drama television series that follows the lives of Superman (Clark Kent) and Lois Lane as they navigate the challenges of being a superhero and a working parent. The show explores the complexities of balancing work, justice, and parenthood in today's society. It features a strong cast, including Tyler Hoechlin as Clark Kent and Elizabeth Tulloch as Lois Lane, and has been praised for its character development and family dynamics. The series has been well-received for its portrayal of Superman as a kindhearted hero and the importance of family in his life.
response.tagline: The world’s most famous superhero and comic books’ most famous journalist face one of their greatest challenges ever: parenthood.
response.title: Superman & Lois
